ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tickers" (
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock ticker */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company associated with the ticker */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering date of the company */,
  "headquarters_address" TEXT /* Headquarters address of the company */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company */,
  "annual_report_link" TEXT /* Link to the company's annual report */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* Company's official website */,
  "stock_type" TEXT /* Type of stock (e.g., Common, Preferred) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical price entry */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock ticker */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded on the given date */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "trading_time" TEXT /* Time of the trading day */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume weighted average price */,
  "bid_ask_spread" REAL /* Difference between the highest and lowest bid-ask prices */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_prices_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "target_return_rate" REAL /* Target return rate for the portfolio */,
  "risk_tolerance" TEXT /* Risk tolerance level of the portfolio */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_holdings" (
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holding */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio the holding belongs to */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock ticker in the holding */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares held */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the shares were purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the shares were purchased */,
  "current_price" REAL /* Current price of the shares */,
  "last_valuation_date" TEXT /* Date of the last valuation */,
  "transaction_fees" REAL /* Transaction fees associated with the purchase */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view portfolio) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "geolocation" TEXT /* Geolocation of the user */,
  "session_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
